nodes.label: lib/dns-patch.mjs
nodes.summary: Monkey-patches Node.js dns.lookup to fall back to Google Public DNS (8.8.8.8 / 1.1.1.1) when system resolver fails, fixing Tailscale + NixOS DNS issues.

hyperedges.relation: NixOS/environment compatibility layer: dns-patch.mjs fixes Tailscale DNS, migration doc records provider switch history, and lib/ai.ts holds the current working provider config.
